publishedAbstract: - Liveness probe failed: command timed out ~~~ 2h36m Warning Unhealthy pod/rook-ceph-osd-0-fc766844-XXXX Liveness probe errored: rpc error: code = Unknown desc = command error: time="2023-05-10T11:57:09Z" level=error msg="exec failed: cannot exec a container that has stopped" ~~~- Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF) HEALTH_WARN ~~~ $ ceph status health: HEALTH_WARN 3 daemons have recently crashed ~~~- Slow request in the `rook-ceph-osd` pod ~~~ $ oc logs rook-ceph-osd-0-fc7668444-55d9z-n openshift-storage 2023-05-10T14:21:23.991466625Z debug 2023-05-10T14:21:23.990+0000 7f34966b2700 0 log_channel(cluster) log [WRN]: slow request osd_op(client.50334176.0:49366163 1.7 1:e2dbb4ce:::rbd_data.eb2e98be144ef9.0000000000000231:head [set-alloc-hint object_size 4194304 write_size 4194304,write 2674688~4096 in=4096b] snapc 0=[] ondisk+write+known_if_redirected e331403) initiated 2023-05-10T14:18:23.364198+0000 currently waiting for sub ops ~~~
publishedTitle: Liveness probe failed for rook-ceph-osd pod
